entities.name: style
entities.context: Refers to an object used for styling output in the console.

entities.name: ansi
entities.context: Refers to a standard for color coding in terminal outputs.

entities.name: hsl
entities.context: Represents a color model based on hue, saturation, and lightness.

entities.name: rgb
entities.context: Represents a color model based on red, green, and blue.

entities.name: hex
entities.context: Represents a color model based on hexadecimal color codes.

relationships.context: Style uses ANSI standards for console output colors.
Uses HSL color model for background color.
Uses RGB color model for text color.
Uses Hex color model for specifying color.
